items.title: Fired Michigan coach Moore reaches plea deal

items.title: UNC's Wilson (thumb surgery) done for season
items.description: North Carolina star freshman Caleb Wilson will miss the remainder of the season after breaking his right thumb during practice, the school announced.

items.title: OT Decker, longest-tenured Lion, asks for release
items.description: Offensive lineman Taylor Decker, the Lions' longest-tenured player, has requested his release, he announced on social media.
